subject: Cycle 8a intent e4cd0af4 staged + record-staged; ready for marshal-cycle (ADR-187 + README; subject 89ch; pre-format cure applied; independent stage-set)
body:

This is my Implementer trailing-task closeout; once you land it I drop to pure-Director discipline per owner direction. — Misty (02b325, Director)
